content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Dual-GPU Inference on a Laptop</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=Poppins:wght@700;800&display=swap');

  :root {
    --bg-dark: #0f172a;
    --bg-card: #1e293b;
    --bg-card-alt: #334155;
    --accent-blue: #3b82f6;
    --accent-cyan: #06b6d4;
    --accent-green: #10b981;
    --accent-amber: #f59e0b;
    --accent-red: #ef4444;
    --accent-purple: #8b5cf6;
    --text-primary: #f1f5f9;
    --text-secondary: #94a3b8;
    --text-muted: #64748b;
    --border: #334155;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    background: #000;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 40px;
    padding: 40px;
  }

  .slide {
    width: 1080px;
    height: 1350px;
    background: var(--bg-dark);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    padding: 72px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    page-break-after: always;
  }

  @page { size: 1080px 1350px; margin: 0; }
  @media print {
    body { padding: 0; gap: 0; background: none; }
    .slide { break-after: page; }
  }

  .slide::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -200px; right: -200px;
    width: 500px; height: 500px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
